s: Vote, shop & explore SuperSMP anywhere! Companion app for server features
d:
The Ultimate SuperSMP Companion App - Your Server, Everywhere!

Enhance your SuperSMP Minecraft experience with the official companion app designed for players on the go! Access essential server features, stay connected with the community, and manage your server interactions right from your Android device.

KEY FEATURES:

SMART VOTING SYSTEM
- Vote for the SuperSMP server directly from your phone
- Quick access to all voting platforms
- Track your voting history and rewards
- Never miss daily vote rewards again

INTEGRATED SHOP ACCESS
- Browse the official SuperSMP shop catalog
- View detailed item descriptions and pricing
- Make secure purchases on-the-go
- Real-time inventory updates

INTERACTIVE SERVER MAP
- Access the official SuperSMP world map
- Real-time player locations and activity
- Navigate spawn, warps, and key locations
- Perfect for exploration and planning

MODERN USER INTERFACE
- Built with Jetpack Compose for smooth animations
- Material Design 3 with Dynamic Color support (Android 12+)
- OLED Black Mode for AMOLED screens
- Intuitive navigation optimized for mobile
- Responsive design for all screen sizes

TECHNICAL EXCELLENCE
- Kotlin-first development for performance
- Privacy-focused WebView with tracker blocking
- Modern architecture with MVVM pattern
- Regular updates with new features
- Optimized for battery life and performance

MOBILE OPTIMIZATIONS
- Fast loading times even on slower connections
- Offline mode for cached content
- Push notifications for server events (coming soon)
- Designed for Android 7.0 and above

WHY CHOOSE THIS APP?

FREE & OPEN SOURCE - No hidden costs or subscriptions
SECURE - Your data and accounts are protected
REGULARLY UPDATED - New features and improvements monthly
COMMUNITY DRIVEN - Features requested by players like you
AD-FREE EXPERIENCE - Focus on what matters: your gameplay

PERFECT FOR:

Daily voters who want to maximize rewards
Shop enthusiasts who browse items frequently
Explorers who need map access on-the-go
Community members who stay connected
Players who want convenience without compromise

IMPORTANT NOTE:
This is an unofficial companion app created by fans for the SuperSMP community. It is not affiliated with or endorsed by the SuperSMP Minecraft Server team. All server content and branding remain property of their respective owners.

SYSTEM REQUIREMENTS:
Android 7.0 (API 24) or higher
50MB free storage space
Internet connection for real-time features

UPCOMING FEATURES:
Player statistics tracking
In-game chat integration
Push notifications for server events
Multi-language support
Offline mode enhancements

COMMUNITY SUPPORT:
Join our growing community of SuperSMP players! Report bugs, request features, and connect with fellow users through our GitHub repository. Your feedback helps shape the future of this app!

Download now and take your SuperSMP experience to the next level!
